wordcountReduction: Opening shoreline read lost repeated scenic cushioning; the lake, boats, and ward now arrive as one tactical sweep.
Boat-crossing prose was cut to the load-bearing beats: oars, ward pressure, wall, climb.
Service-corridor and workroom inventory were compressed so the horror lands through selected detail instead of full catalogue.
Jandice's interrogation was shortened to proof-bearing lines only: room, Jaina, lower stair.
The sanctum fight lost commentary between beats; geometry, cue, and kill now move in one line of force.
Exit and road handoff were cut to the operational facts: slipping wards, escaped scholar, relay warning, plague mechanism.
hitlistPatterns: Document-voice trim: 'built less to stop a boat than feel one' stays scene-native while heavier explanatory phrasing was cut from ward and room reads.
Narrator over-explanation was reduced in the sanctum; the cold cup, chalk, and posture now carry the misread without extra footnotes.
Expression decomposition was cut out of the Jandice struggle and sanctum aftermath; reactions land as stillness, gaze, and pain instead of staged phases.
Repetition and monotony were trimmed in the approach, climb, and return crossing by collapsing duplicate motion beats.
Inanimate-subject agency was reduced around the crypt and exit; concrete objects and bodies do the work instead of atmosphere phrases piling up.
Stacked inventory clusters were cut in the workrooms and on Kel'Thuzad's desk so each paragraph keeps one or two anchors instead of full lists.
POV distance stayed low; no added filter scaffolding survived the polish pass beyond spoken 'I saw,' which is dialogue, not narration.
Abstract judgment language was cut from Sylvanas's read of Jaina; the crack stays in spacing, chalk, and timing.
dialogueRegister: Sylvanas's lines stayed clipped and field-useful: route, ward, movement, road use.
Cyndia's speech remained plain and operational; no report jargon slipped into the relay beat.
Jandice sounds bitter and social rather than academic-clinical, which keeps her resentment human.
Jaina's post-kill summary stays in living language: 'The grain isn't the plague. It carries it.'
Jaina's road briefing was kept to action value only; she gives what changes Stratholme first.
Kel'Thuzad retains occult-academic calm without drifting into modern lab diction.
metaAudit: Dense paragraph re-read 1: shoreline through boat launch. Cut repeated lake setup and extra approach cushioning.
Dense paragraph re-read 2: sanctum entry through Sylvanas's misread. Cut duplicate evidence beats and kept the cold-cup/chalk cluster once.
Dense paragraph re-read 3: fight midpoint through kill shot. Cut explanation between opening, pulse, warning, and release.
Close re-read of quoted lines found no institutional or clinical jargon in spoken dialogue after polish.
Close re-read of the road handoff kept the chapter-end urgency while removing surplus transition prose.
Voice cross-check: every replacement stayed in Sylvanas's tactical lane or Jaina's pressured analytical lane, not editor voice.

changes.before: Caer Darrow rose in pieces: seawall, tower, old stone dark with damp. The manor behind them had been the front door.
changes.after: Caer Darrow rose in pieces: seawall, tower, old stone. The manor had been the front door.

changes.before: Sylvanas dismounted and crossed the last stretch on foot.
changes.after: Sylvanas dismounted and walked the last stretch.

changes.before: They want visitors to find them.
Silence, then the place beneath it: a door overhead, steps, ward-hum in the walls.
changes.after: Silence, then a door overhead, steps, ward-hum in the walls.

changes.before: The corridor had been broken into workrooms: a pantry turned reagent store, a family archive turned records room, a sitting room stripped to stone and worktables.
changes.after: The corridor had been broken into workrooms.

changes.before: "She asked him questions?" / "Real ones." / "And he answered." / "In full."
changes.after: "She asked him questions?" / "Real ones. He answered in full."

changes.before: failed stock hung from hooks by wire through wrists and ankles, some dead, some moving after a fashion that showed memory had not stayed with the meat
changes.after: failed stock hung from hooks by wire through wrists and ankles

changes.before: A cold cup within reach. Boards worked over for hours. Chalk on skin. No sign of struggle anywhere in the room.
changes.after: Cold cup. Boards worked over. Chalk on skin. No sign of struggle.

changes.before: She caught the desk edge, turned, and found Jaina reading the pattern already.
"I know how it wakes," she said. / "The grain carries the outer shell. The body learns the rest from living with it. Death lets it answer."
changes.after: kept and positioned as the road-use version of the mechanism explanation

changes.before: Jaina sat in the middle with the staff across her knees. Sylvanas took the bow and let shore grow out of haze.
Sylvanas set herself forward-right by half a step and kept there, close enough to check the mage without seeming to, far enough that anyone who knew the old line would see the change.
changes.after: Sylvanas set herself forward-right by half a step, close enough to check the mage without seeming to, far enough that anyone who knew the old line would see the change.

flags: Line 21 dialogue 'I saw' kept — spoken acknowledgment, not narration filter-word.
Kel'Thuzad's lecture-calm lines were preserved; they already match the occult-academic voice sheet and read as character, not slop.
